title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Maintenance Orders Enforcement Act, 1921. 1(2) It extends to the whole of India 2[except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*].]
footnote: 1. Subs., ibid.,for sub-section (2). 2. Subs. by Act 3 of 1951, s. 3 and the Schedule, for "except Part B States". *. Vide Notification No. S.O. 3912 (E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
